data.content: Implementation review rejected on 2026-04-02. AC3 fails because successful background session exits still invalidate active beat queries immediately via session-connection-manager -> invalidateBeatListQueries. AC4/AC5 fail because there is no executable Playwright latency spec or browser-network verification artifact in the repo. Gate status: tsc/test/build passed; lint did not complete cleanly because eslint traversed generated .worktrees/.../.next output, so lint is unverified.
